artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a creased complimentary midway ticket pinched between fingers, its surface a blank smudged void catching hot-gold firelight, soft scuffs from many resales, drifting ember sparks and a hazy lurid-neon carnival dissolving into smoky black behind, the small slip glowing with tender corrupt privilege, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Mayor's Comp Ticket
text:
When The Mayor's Comp Ticket enters the battlefield, if an opponent controls a Goblin or an incumbent, draw a card. (Politicians always cash in their free passes.)
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice The Mayor's Comp Ticket: Add {B}{B} or {R}{R}. The house comps the Mayor's bets, then quietly bills the city.
flavorText: 'GOOD FOR ONE FREE SPIN — COMPLIMENTS OF CITY HALL — DO NOT RESELL (resold seven times).'

extras.interaction: rewards opponents running Goblins / incumbents (the Mayor)
